name: IdsEdwCmnPrctCrdtlSpecDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte AS ( SELECT CPCS.CMN_PRCT_CRDTL_SPEC_SK, CPCS.CRDTL_SPEC_TYP_DESC, CPCS.CMN_PRCT_ID, CPCS.CRDTL_SPEC_SEQ_NO, CPCS.CMN_PRCT_SK, CPCS.CRDTL_SPEC_DESC, CM.TRGT_CD FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CMN_PRCT_CRDTL_SPEC CPCS LEFT OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CM ON CPCS.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CM.CD_MPPNG_SK ) SELECT cte.CMN_PRCT_CRDTL_SPEC_SK AS CMN_PRCT_CRDTL_SPEC_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(cte.TRGT_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE dbo.trim_default(cte.TRGT_CD) END AS SRC_SYS_CD, cte.CMN_PRCT_ID AS CMN_PRCT_ID, cte.CRDTL_SPEC_SEQ_NO AS CMN_PRCT_CRDTL_SPEC_SEQ_NO, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, cte.CMN_PRCT_SK AS CMN_PRCT_SK, cte.CRDTL_SPEC_DESC AS CMN_PRCT_CRDTL_SPEC_DESC, CASE WHEN cte.CRDTL_SPEC_TYP_DESC = 'Primary Specialty' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS CMN_PRCT_CRDTL_SPEC_PRI_IN, cte.CRDTL_SPEC_TYP_DESC AS CMN_PRCT_CRDTL_SPEC_TYP_DESC, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM cte

Annotations:
This job extract data from IDS CMN_PRCT_CRDTL_SPEC
DB2 connector brings in data from IDS table CMN_PRCT_CRDTL_SPEC
Data is written into a load ready SF file named as CMN_PRCT_CRDTL_SPEC_D.dat
Add Defaults and Null Handling.
JOB NAME: IdsEdwCmnPrctCrdtlSpecDExtr
